flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Montgomery County Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (7.2k vs 9.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Montgomery County Community College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.7k → $6.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Montgomery County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Montgomery County Community College rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 (9.0k → 10.5k).
